title: Antique Trains
description: Adds an overlay to the Antique Atlas Mod to view Create Mod Train Tracks
body:
This mods adds a toggle button to the antique atlas to display/hide train tracks from the create mod. Having the train tracks visible on the map might be helpful to find the closest train station, plan the place of new train tracks and stations.


**Note:** this mod requires Antique Atlas to be loaded on NeoForge using Sinytra Connector and the NeoForge Version of the Create Mod
